sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34622" key="e)/mfimos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔμφῑμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n34622.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">closed</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄπωμος</foreign>, Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg010:p.113B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.113B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
